cards.notes: Starter strike, replace when possible
Starter defend, replace when possible
Starter 0-cost attack. Creator says 'very very good' starter — combos with vuln and star payoffs
Starter skill. Worse starter, generates two stars but much worse than other star generators
Has its uses but very often kind of clunky. There's about one card you can pick this with
Forge rare, forge mechanic is not good on this character
Top of B tier. Not amazing payoff for stars but 0-cost AoE, can loop it
Usually pretty bad. Forge mechanic not great, hard to hit enemy enough times, mid as a rare
End of A tier. Good early damage, adds Dive Bomb (13 dmg exhaust), targeted exhaust for going infinite
S tier. Basically adrenaline — energy generation, card generation, goes infinite easily with exhaust removal
Pretty slow, never really want it. Doesn't scale with burst stars, just instances. Pick only if desperate for AoE
Extremely good. One card solve — kills bosses while you block. Scary early game makes this essential. Spot in the top
Middle of the road. Two for 13 is good rate but forge mechanic bad, doesn't fit infinite gameplan
Disgusting. Doesn't even cheat energy costs. Terrible, don't take it
Two energy deal 18, not amazing. Multi-hit with vigor combos possible but just not great
One of the premium ways to exhaust cards. Cheap targeted exhaust, thins deck, premium utility
Best card in the class. Mental fortress — gain block whenever you spend stars. Tier of its own
Okay, decent block. Not the premium one but helps frontload block while playing Glow
Okay, decent early game thing. Lets you push damage without energy. Don't really want it most of the time
One of the best payoffs for stars. 0-cost, insane scaling damage, 3 weak 3 vuln. Big loop payoff
Pretty bad, only ever transformed into it. Sovereign Blade deals double but it's 3 energy deal 26, not great
Insanely strong. Main infinite enabler, cheats energy, retain hand is incredibly powerful. Basically Pyramid
Basically headbutt but block. Okay — doesn't make stars but can line up combos
Basically hyperbeam. Awful — fills hand with debris statuses that cost energy to remove
Pretty terrible. Costs one energy you don't want to pay, star cost is awkward for looping
Fine common. AoE with strength loss for act one, but use case drops off after that
Six stars hard to get. Has utility and can do something if you cheat the cost, but inconsistent
One of the worst star payoffs. Four stars is awkward number — starter deck doesn't make excess stars
Top of C tier. Pretty situational — great in AoE fights, bad in single target. Ethereal, rare slot competition
Seek delayed by one turn, quite good. Doesn't exhaust so chains throughout fight. Lines up combos
Forge package can solve bosses but is pretty freaking slow. One card solve but only when desperate
Definitely a very good card. One of the bigger payoffs for the loop — 0-cost with debuffs (weak + vuln)
Pretty good card, up here somewhere. Making stars is good, blocking is good, better than Cosmic Indifference
Very solid card. Makes 2-3 stars a turn, pushes you over threshold to play expensive payoffs like Comet
Okay — draw cards is good but wildly inconsistent. Draw order dependent, top deck manipulation awkward
Okay number, B tier area. Bit better than Bulwark as common block. Strong early game block
S tier — equivalent to Defect's Coolheaded. Core card on the class. Common you build entire deck around
Crazy card. Targeted Fiend Fire — exhaust bad cards, keep good ones, blocks while setting up infinite. Disgusting
One of the better commons. Mini Predator — high damage + draw 3 next turn. Doesn't fall off late game
Multiplayer card, not relevant for solo play
Super situational. Not many ways to make energy, so X cost is bad. Most runs you don't want it
Fine, B tier. Cheats energy (refunds next turn). Early damage card, but doesn't transition well to late game
Never clicked this card. 17 damage for two energy not great, copy a colorless card unclear payoff
One of the better ways to make stars. Makes 4-5 stars — fully pays for Gamma Blast. Overall pretty strong
Fine, nine block is quite good. But top deck manipulation isn't what this character does. Not happy to see this
Pretty bad. Four energy deal 24, discounts when drawn. Not unpickable if desperate for damage, but not great
Worse version of Kingly Kick. Worse rampage, doesn't frontload damage. Just not that good
Early game this thing is disgusting. Kills elites, upgrades to 38 damage with vuln. Gives stars for follow-up plays
Pretty middling. Starter card has same effect + deals damage. Okay as pseudo-block, just not great
Not discussed in tier list — resource generation utility, replaceable
Really bad. Not a great payoff for playing skills. Inconsistent, bricks a lot
C tier for now. Kind of like Flurry of Blows but not helping combos. Mediocre damage, not contributing past early game
Not discussed in tier list — creator hasn't seen or the card may have been misidentified in transcript
Creator hasn't seen this card but says it looks like 'insane rate' and 'better Gamma Blast'. Uncertain placement
Horrible card. Way too expensive, doesn't do enough. After image for attacks at 3 cost is terrible
Not discussed in tier list — minor utility
Costs a lot, inconsistent. In the rare slot, often can't play it. Cards that need right draw order are bad
Not amazing. Basically a kind of bad energy relic that costs two. Energy hasn't been the main limiting factor
Awful. Conditional power that does nothing — can't play five cards, and if you can, you're already infinite
Gain 6 block when playing Sovereign Blade. Not that much, and blade deck isn't good
Premium block option on the character. Goes absolutely nuts early game with Hidden Cache. Returns to hand for looping
Numbers are okay. Thrown in C tier — not significant utility, just a block card
Overperforming. Upgrade is 13 damage draw 2 — basically Pommel Strike. Quite solid damage common that sets up next turn
Creation build just not that great. Not a strong enough archetype, not supported. Awkward
At two energy, can never afford to play this. Drawing six cards but no energy to play them. Feels really bad
Paying two stars to randomly select a colorless card feels really bad. Not discounted either
Just okay, B tier area. AoE makes it decent early game pickup. Chance to get broken with enchantments
Don't want this ever. Forge is not great, just bad
Insanely high output card. Deals ridiculous amount of damage back, also deals AoE in multi-enemy fights. Premium rate
Strength not what this character wants. Too many stars cost, doesn't feel good. Bottom of C / D
Feels quite good, near Begone. Four stars net is insane. Zero energy, upgrades to retain. Lines up well
Gold meta-scaling is awkward. Shops worse in STS2, don't early shop. B tier area — gold does something but limited
Just okay. Number is good and deals AoE, but it's the blade package which isn't great
Star cost hard to get but payoff worth it. Hits 7 times, wipes the field. Main damage engine in some runs
Kind of cracked. Draw every turn, make 2 stars. Makes all payoff cards work. Gives direction early
Decent damage common, similar to Gather Light but block is better than damage. Tiny bit lower
Really bad. Costs two, incredibly difficult to play and have it do anything. Way too slow
Awful. Forge 10 is just not great, don't want to be doing the forge thing
Pretty bad card. X times star cost, don't often have excess stars. Hasn't gotten it to work
Definitely one of the better forge cards, but still not enough to put it in good tier
Maybe will do something. Creation archetype not strong enough yet, not going to be very high
Pretty awful. Sword needs to cost less not more. Can't play blade the turn you play this
Doesn't do anything. Vigor packages nothing, just random cards that don't work
Boss exclusive but quite good. Goes infinite, really good standalone. Opportunity cost of picking over boss relics
Seems terrible. Need stars AND forge, just awful. Only good from Skill Potion
Really bad. Randomly exhausting stuff is rough, rares are just completely unpickable
One of the best cards on the class. Like Echo Form — first two cards free (cheats star costs too). You probably just win
Does enough damage for early game. Throw this up in B — not building forge around it but helps if dying to elites
